stemHtml: Just after passing V1 during a take-off ground roll, but before rotating, you suddenly hear a fire warning bell and notice the illumination of left engine fire warning light of your twin-engine airplane. What is your first action?

options.a: Lift off and instantly turn your aircraft for performing an emergency landing.
options.b: Continue the take-off, stabilize the aircraft and climb.
options.c: Start to extinguish the engine fire immediately.
